102 Kakuro puzzled of 16 x 20 puzzle grid6 more kakuro puzzles bonus108 kakuro puzzles in totalBoth symmetric (about 20 puzzles) and non-symmetric grid (88 puzzles)1 puzzle per pageMedium to hard dificultySome digits are provided in the white cells (to be filled) as extra clues (which make the puzzle somewhat easier to start)Number puzzlesMath puzzlesThis Kakuro puzzle book is great addition for fans of logic puzzles, number games, and brain-training challenges. Kakuro puzzles, also called mathematical crosswords, combine simple addition with pure logic, making them fun and enjoyable Japanese logic puzzles for adults and seniors. Designed for beginners and experienced solvers alike, this puzzle book features Kakuro puzzles ranging from medium to hard. Although some puzzle might feel easier, this book also have challenging puzzles. The clear layouts and easy-to-read grids make it especially suitable for seniors and adults who enjoy relaxing yet stimulating brain games. Inside this Kakuro puzzle book the reader will find: i) 100+ original Kakuro puzzles, medium, and challenging difficulty levels, ii) puzzles approachable for beginners, iii) larger and easy-to-read grids which is great for seniors as well. Kakuro puzzles are a wonderful way to support mental sharpness, logical thinking, and focus at any age. If one enjoy Sudoku, crosswords, or math logic puzzles, this kakuro puzzle book offers a satisfying and rewarding brain workout for seniors, parents, grandparents, puzzle lovers, or anyone who enjoys calm, screen-free entertainment.

items.text:
Your one-stop shop for all things puzzly. 
Puzzlewright Press prides itself on commitment to quality, accuracy, creativity, variety, inclusivity, and fun! Our products cover core puzzle types such as crosswords and sudoku, as well as every other genre: logic games, brainteasers, word searches, memory puzzles, mazes, acrostics, trivia, kakuro, chess, and more.

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find these Kakuro puzzles relatively easy and enjoyable, with one noting they can complete them without glasses. Customers describe them as lots of fun.

keywords.name: Difficulty
keywords.text: Customers find these Kakuro puzzles relatively easy, with an extra bit of challenge that makes them enjoyable, and one customer notes they can be completed without glasses.

partialReviews.text: Great fun: challenging, but solvable in about an hour per puzzle. I often had to leave and return to see the solution.
...I like the green level best because it's not too easy and not too hard....
The puzzles are challenging, so that's good, but the pages/puzzles are too small to pencil in more than two numbers in a square....
I am no dummy, but these puzzles are VERY hard! I have done Kakuro before....

keywords.name: Engaging
keywords.text: Customers find the book engaging and lots of fun.

partialReviews.text: As advertised. Lots of fun and good for a beginner.
Lots of great puzzles in this book. Very engaging, especially the medium ones.
Great fun: challenging, but solvable in about an hour per puzzle. I often had to leave and return to see the solution.
...is has challenging but solvable puzzles and will give you many hour of enjoyable pastime.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This book is has challenging but solvable puzzles and will give you many hour of enjoyable pastime.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on May 13, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is the 4th copy of Second-degree Green Belt I got. I've done all the other Belt levels. Anything above Green Belt is too much, and it takes the fun out of it. I'm able to solve about 70% of the puzzles in this book. So it's challenging, but not too Challenging.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 19, 2020

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: I like the green level best because it's not too easy ...
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I got started on these years ago. I did green, brown, black, and now I'm half-way through the second-degree green. I like the green level best because it's not too easy and not too hard. The black level (even though I'd worked up to it) was always so slow going and required far too much thinking.Interestingly, I can do these puzzles without glasses (even though I need glasses to read). I guess we process numbers and puzzles differently and so I can just lie in bed, sans glasses, and do puzzles until I'm ready to sleep.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on September 22, 2014

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Lots of great puzzles in this book. Very engaging, especially the medium ones.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on July 4, 2023

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I absolutely love this series.  It is a good size -- easy for travel or just use at home.  I use mine as a travel journal of sorts.  I take it on trips and as I do each puzzle I record the date and what I did that day.  Fun to look back at.  I had done all the first degree books and was excited to see the new second degree series out!  The puzzles are a good size and print is easy to read.  After finishing 6 of these books I am yet to find an error.  I used to be a suduko player, but got bored.  These books have kept my interest for quite awhile.  It takes me about a year to finish each book.  I've done several different books over the years and this series has been by far my favorite.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 2, 2015

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: These puzzles keep my old brail active
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I love the extra bit of challenge these puzzles give me. It's more creati e than just plugging in Sudoku numbers. I've go through several levels now and this one is my favorite!!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on May 31, 2022

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I found this puzzle book challenging at first and still challenging when I finished it.  The green belt designation threw me at first as it felt more like a brown belt book. I started taking a long time to complete a puzzle but improved as time went on.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on October 26, 2012

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: A bit harder than the White Belt which is as expected so that's good.
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I used to do these puzzles all the time in Games and World of Puzzles but hadn't found them else where until now.  Love them!These are harder than White Belt but still doable for me.It has all answers so when I go off track, I can use the answers to figure  out how much to erase and redo.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on August 21, 2014

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Simply excellent and makes one to be focussed on completion

El nivel de los juegos de este libro hace que sea más entretenido que los de cinturón negro. Para aquel que le gusten los kakuros, y que no quiera estar demasiado tiempo intentando resolver cada puzzle este es un buen libro.

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: Good level of difficulty and very addictive
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I bought this for my wife as a present.  She was immediately addicted and didn't stop until she finished it (this took a month as there are 150 puzzles).She is not new to Kakuro and found the puzzles challenging.  They get progressively harder the further you advance in the book.Now on to the next level ( I'm going to be a Kakuro widow for even longer)
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 27, 2016

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: das Heft hat mir gut gefallen. Die Größe der Rätsel über eine ganze Seite und das Finden von Lösungen durch logisches Vorgehen waren der Maßstab. Die Rätsel sind mittelschwer; man sollte also schon eine gewisse Erfahrung haben und Lösungstricks kennen. Allerdings benutze ich auch die Tabelle mit den Zahlenkombinationen.Urteil: Empfehlendswert

raw_products.bookDescription:
🧩 600 Kakuro Puzzles: Easy, Medium, and Hard – A Unique Collection of Cross Sum Puzzles 🧩
Discover the ultimate Kakuro puzzle experience with 600 Kakuro Puzzles! This diverse collection is designed to cater to puzzle lovers of all levels, offering a wide range of challenges that will sharpen your logic and keep you engaged. With puzzles ranging from small grids to more complex layouts, there’s something for everyone.
🧩 600 Kakuro Puzzles: Easy, Medium, and Hard – A Unique Collection of Cross Sum Puzzles 🧩Discover the ultimate Kakuro puzzle experience with 600 Kakuro Puzzles! This diverse collection is designed to cater to puzzle lovers of all levels, offering a wide range of challenges that will sharpen your logic and keep you engaged. With puzzles ranging from small grids to more complex layouts, there’s something for everyone.Why This Book is Perfect for You:🟡 99 Easy 6x6 Puzzles: Start your Kakuro journey with simple and accessible grids that ease you into the fun of cross sum logic.🟡 66 Easy 10x10 Puzzles: Bigger grids offer a more enjoyable challenge while keeping the difficulty low for beginners.🟡 33 Easy 19x12 Puzzles: Take on larger grids at the easy level, perfect for practicing without too much pressure.🔴 99 Medium 6x6 Puzzles: Ideal for solvers ready to move beyond the basics and test their skills with moderate challenges.🔴 66 Medium 10x10 Puzzles: Enjoy the complexity of medium-sized grids that push your logical thinking just a bit further.🔴 33 Medium 19x12 Puzzles: A step up in size and difficulty, these puzzles are designed to give you a satisfying mental workout.⚫ 102 Hard 6x6 Puzzles: Don’t let the small size fool you—these puzzles will truly test your Kakuro-solving skills.⚫ 68 Hard 10x10 Puzzles: For experienced solvers, these larger puzzles will challenge your ability to think critically and strategically.⚫ 34 Hard 19x12 Puzzles: The ultimate test of logic and patience, these large and intricate puzzles are perfect for Kakuro experts.🗂️ Complete Solutions: Need a little help or want to double-check your work? Full solutions are included at the back of the book.📏 Optimal Format: The 8.5x11 inch size provides plenty of room to solve each puzzle comfortably while maintaining portability.✨ Glossy Cover: Sturdy and stylish, the glossy cover protects your book and adds a touch of elegance to your puzzle-solving collection.Perfect for Kakuro enthusiasts of all levels, 600 Kakuro Puzzles will provide hours of brain-boosting fun. Whether you’re looking to relax or challenge your problem-solving abilities, this collection has it all!

no dislikes like the size of the puzzles and the extra work space on each page

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Lots of challenging puzzles
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on September 17, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Nice price for 600 puzzles 👍 3 small, 2 medium, and 1 large size puzzle per page is great. It classifies the puzzles as easy, medium, and hard, but the easy difficulty is not novice. If you have never played Kakuro before, it might be overwhelming. I've played for hours and will play for several more. Thanks, Josh Ortiz Martin 👍
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on December 10, 2023

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: We are always looking for Kakuro puzzles on good paper, so we can erase if we need to, without destroying the page.  The puzzles, although it says Easy, Medium, Hard,  lean toward easy and medium.  I haven't found any that I couldn't do.  I do write in possible answers as I do them, but I think my husband who is better at them would do them all without any erasing.  But they aren't so easy that they are boring.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 25, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I don't often need to rely on the answers in the back of the book, but the way they are given makes it hard to discover a mistake and correct it.  The answers are given in rows instead of being able to see the whole puzzle.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: It is more challenging than other Kakuro books that I have used in the past (for the easy and medium puzzles).  And the way they have the answers listed in the back makes it almost impossible to use (especially if you want to just peek at one cell to see if you are doing things correctly).  The book is 8 1/2" X 11" so it is not something you can tuck in a pocket and carry with you.  I do like the fact that it is printed with ink that I am not sensitive to - so I will keep it.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 26, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I love these kinds of puzzles. The best features of this particular book:1. EXCELLENT quality paper, important because many erasures are necessary;2. Each page has small & medium size puzzles plus one large puzzle3. The difficulty slooooowly increases, so my skill level increased also
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on April 11, 2023

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Each page has puzzles of various levels of difficulty.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Printed on decent paper that can stand up to erasers fine.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on October 25, 2024

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Perfetto! diverse difficoltà, soluzioni incluse. Divertimento assicurato

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on June 22, 2025

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I don't do puzzles, but my good lady loves them. She says these are excellent.

raw_products.title: The Ultimate Kakuro Puzzle Book for Adults: 260 Cross Sums Logic Puzzles from Easy to Hard for Hours of Fun and Mind-Training Challenges
raw_products.author: CM7074 Bros
raw_products.breadCrumbs: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Logic & Brain Teasers

attributes.value: #1,052,704 in Books (See Top 100 in Books) #802 in Math Games#2,633 in Logic & Brain Teasers (Books)#5,244 in Puzzles (Books)

raw_products.bookDescription:
✨ Ready to challenge your mind while having fun?Discover Kakuro, the ultimate number-logic puzzle that combines the strategy of crosswords with the thrill of Sudoku — a perfect daily workout for your brain.
This complete collection of 260 puzzles is designed for adults and seniors who love keeping their minds sharp, focused, and entertained. With large print and a progressive structure, it’s ideal both for beginners and experienced solvers looking for new challenges.
✨ Ready to challenge your mind while having fun?Discover Kakuro, the ultimate number-logic puzzle that combines the strategy of crosswords with the thrill of Sudoku — a perfect daily workout for your brain.This complete collection of 260 puzzles is designed for adults and seniors who love keeping their minds sharp, focused, and entertained. With large print and a progressive structure, it’s ideal both for beginners and experienced solvers looking for new challenges.What You’ll Get Inside🧩 260 Puzzles with Solutions – Each carefully designed with one clear, logical answer.🎯 3 Levels of Difficulty – 80 Easy puzzles (6×6 and 7×7 grids), 100 Medium puzzles (8×8 and 9×9 grids), and 80 Hard puzzles (10×10, 13×13, 14×14 grids).📖 Large Print Format (8.5 × 11 in) – Designed for maximum comfort, with 4 puzzles per page for grids up to 9×9, 2 puzzles per page for 10×10, and 1 puzzle per page for the largest grids.🧠 Progressive Challenge – Start simple and advance to more complex puzzles, steadily boosting memory, logic, and concentration skills.🌟 Fun and Mind-Training Challenges – Kakuro puzzles are more than just entertainment: they sharpen focus, improve problem-solving, strengthen memory, reduce stress, and offer hours of screen-free relaxation.Whether you’re looking for a fun daily challenge, a mindful break from routine, or a smart gift idea, this book delivers a perfect mix of relaxation and brain-boosting fun.👉 Don’t wait — grab your copy today and start boosting your brain while having fun!
🧩 260 Puzzles with Solutions – Each carefully designed with one clear, logical answer.
🎯 3 Levels of Difficulty – 80 Easy puzzles (6×6 and 7×7 grids), 100 Medium puzzles (8×8 and 9×9 grids), and 80 Hard puzzles (10×10, 13×13, 14×14 grids).
📖 Large Print Format (8.5 × 11 in) – Designed for maximum comfort, with 4 puzzles per page for grids up to 9×9, 2 puzzles per page for 10×10, and 1 puzzle per page for the largest grids.
🧠 Progressive Challenge – Start simple and advance to more complex puzzles, steadily boosting memory, logic, and concentration skills.
🌟 Fun and Mind-Training Challenges – Kakuro puzzles are more than just entertainment: they sharpen focus, improve problem-solving, strengthen memory, reduce stress, and offer hours of screen-free relaxation.
Whether you’re looking for a fun daily challenge, a mindful break from routine, or a smart gift idea, this book delivers a perfect mix of relaxation and brain-boosting fun.
👉 Don’t wait — grab your copy today and start boosting your brain while having fun!

raw_products.author: Christian Demarco

attributes.value: #249,075 in Books (See Top 100 in Books) #192 in Math Games#764 in Logic & Brain Teasers (Books)#1,537 in Puzzles (Books)

raw_products.bookDescription:
Kakuro puzzles (often referred to as Cross Sums or Cross Addition Puzzles) are number puzzles solved in a crossword style grid. A number above the diagonal line in a black square represents the total of the numbers in the white squares to the right of it; similarly, a number below the diagonal line is the total sum of the digits in the white squares below it.The white squares can contain any of the digits 1 to 9, however, these digits cannot be repeated more than once in any vertical column or horizontal line to make the target number. For example, if the total number in the black square is 4 and there are 2 white squares, the digits must be 1 and 3, they cannot be 2 and 2.Located at the back of this book is a handy reference guide listing all the possible combinations for the numbers from 3 to 45, also listed are the target numbers with only one possible combination.The full number combinations can also be downloaded as a PDF file for easy printing.All puzzles have unique solutions and can be solved using logical methods without guessing. raw_products.bookDescription:
Kakuro Cross Sums - 300 Medium Puzzles - Ideal for Intermediate Solvers
Kakuro puzzles (often referred to as Cross Sums or Cross Addition Puzzles) are number puzzles solved in a crossword style grid.
A number above the diagonal line in a black square represents the total of the numbers in the white squares to the right of it; similarly, a number below the diagonal line is the total sum of the digits in the white squares below it.
The white squares can contain any of the digits 1 to 9, however, these digits cannot be repeated more than once in any vertical column or horizontal line to make the target number. For example, if the total number in the black square is 4 and there are 2 white squares, the digits must be 1 and 3, they cannot be 2 and 2.
Located at the back of this book is a handy reference guide listing all the possible combinations for the numbers from 3 to 45, also listed are the target numbers with only one possible combination.
The full number combinations can also be downloaded as a PDF file for easy printing.
All puzzles have unique solutions and can be solved using logical methods without guessing.

raw_products.bookDescription: Sharpen your logic and arithmetic skills with 100 carefully crafted kakuro puzzles — the legendary "king of pencil puzzles" from Japan.What's Inside:• 50 Easy puzzles to build your confidence and learn kakuro techniques• 50 Medium puzzles for a satisfying mental challenge• Complete solutions section in the back• Large 8.5" × 11" format with one puzzle per page• Clean, easy-to-read grid design with large print clue numbersWhy Kakuro?Kakuro combines the logic of Sudoku with basic arithmetic. Each puzzle has a unique solution — no guessing required. It's pure deductive reasoning that keeps your mind sharp.Perfect for:• Puzzle enthusiasts looking for something beyond Sudoku• Adults and seniors wanting daily brain exercise• Anyone who enjoys screen-free, relaxing mental challenges• Math lovers who appreciate clean logic puzzlesEvery puzzle has exactly one solution — no guessing, just satisfying logic. Whether you're new to kakuro or looking for your next puzzle book, Volume 1 is designed to be both accessible and rewarding.

attributes.value: #345,831 in Books (See Top 100 in Books) #283 in Math Games#1,072 in Logic & Brain Teasers (Books)#2,073 in Puzzles (Books)

raw_products.bookDescription: Sum-thing big is on the horizon Kakuro puzzles (also known as cross sums) are like a combination of crosswords and sudoku: each clue in the grid tells you the sum of the digits in its answer, and just like sudoku, digits are never repeated within an answer. From this simple premise, extremely challenging puzzles can be constructed, and that’s just what Conceptis Puzzles has done for these collections, which each contain 72 supersized kakuro, offering massive solving pleasure for the brave souls who love tackling such challenges.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: These are challenging but not impossible.  My brain gets a "workout."!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 3, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I like to do Kakuro puzzles as I'm mindlessly watching TV or listening to something, This is a large format book that has a sprawling puzzle page. I'd love one that's just a giant poster too but in book format this one is great
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Longtime Kakuro-doer and I find this just right!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I really enjoyed these puzzles. The book is nice and big, making it easier to work on. Great spiral bound book.  I only got stuck near the end of the book and had to peek at the answers. 72 puzzles lasted me over 2 months of almost daily puzzling. Not too easy, which I want now that I have been doing these for quite awhile.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on July 31, 2023
